reviews.review_description: So I downloaded this to hopefully help a friend learn manual shifting better as we are getting CDL A licenses currently. It would be helpful, but the shift pattern is not correct for a truck. It should be reverse top left, then 1 bottom left, 2 middle up, 3 middle down, 4 right up, 5 right down. Then if it would be possible to shift like a 10 speed, add a splitter switch on the shifter. Also, the tachometer is a bit confusing for someone maybe using it as a learning tool. In a truck, it goes up by hundred’s and you sight in most trucks around 1500rpms. Cool, but would be cooler if more accurate so it could be a training tool

developer_response.body:
Hey LoothyGoothy,
Thank you very much for great your constructive review . Please be part of our guidance team. Please contact us by email maddytroupe@gmail.com.  let us share some game keys as token of gratitude. Will talk to you there

reviews.review_description: Love the update the only problem I had was shifting was a little glitchy

developer_response.body:
Dear muchasked,
Please update the game.. now you have auto transmission

reviews.review_description:
Thank you all for downloading and supporting this game.  Spend 5 to 10 minutes for this game and you can master it. Learn how to use brake and put the correct gear during turns. 
Thank you all for considering this game. 
You may contact me on maddytroupe@gmail.com 
Enjoy!!
Has the potential to be a good training tool but needs a lot of work.  You should add pedals and ride along instructor.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jbt1377,
Thank you very much for trying out truck driver. As you said, adding a pedal will improve the gameplay. But for that we need  image processing. I am actually seeking help from others to get it done. Please contact me on maddytroupe@gmail.com.

reviews.review_description:
The game is great, my son and I have had loads of fun driving around but I unlocked a off road looking truck and now it’s locked again
What level & truck unlocks it, I can’t figure it out.

developer_response.body:
Dear DKBaker,
Thank you very much for trying out truck driver and your positive comment.. if a truck gets unlocked and gets locked again, it might be a bug that I should address.. please uninstall and update the game once and see if it's resolved..  otherwise I will rectify the issue in next update and inform you.. 
Please contact me on maddytroupe@gmail.com and let me share some Christmas gifts as a token of gratitude.. if possible please share a screenshot of the missing truck... 
Once again thanks a lot for your comment

Thank you

Thank you

reviews.review_description: Great truck driving game.. loved the Christmas themed level

Truck drive ing sim was so cool to see it’s a bit glitchy but updates and the likes will fix this it’s amazing and fun from the start.

Things are finally going well and it’s thanks to developers like these people.
we’ll done love this and will keep and eye on progress.

I tested it and upload a video short on my YouTube channel to try to help with getting people interested people mostly don’t know much about this kinda thing   I hope I’m helping I love learning and simulation vr it’s amazing so good work developers!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your kind and encouraging words.. means a lot to me As you said , I am working on an update. Kind of confused whether to have left trigger button to accelerate the truck.Please share your thoughts on that. So grateful to you for making a youtube video on the game.. 
Please share your channel link on maddytroupe@gmail.com
FYI: only single developer

reviews.review_description: It’s me Tim and in the first level I can’t drive backwards why????

developer_response.body:
Dear Timst, 
Thank you very much for your positive review. I am working on what you said.. its an experiment and I am not sure you and others will like it.I will be adding a nice snow and rain level also before Christmas.. will inform you when I release the update.. if you have time, please send a mail to maddytroupe@gmail.com and let me share a free download code for another game as a token of gratitude...
Dear Tim
For your second query, may be you need the necessary momentum.. but I will check and get back to you soon. Make sure you press the accelerator button
